name: Honeypot
description: Designed and shipped an online multiplayer party game end-to-end with a collaborator, from concept through production deployment. Users can create game rooms and invite friends to join, then answer prompts and match players to their answers.

name: Community Discord Bot
description: Created a custom Discord bot serving as a management and entertainment tool for over 300 members of a Twitch community. Features include automatic role assignment, a queue system, custom welcome messages, and reaction-based role assignment.

name: Pediatrics Office Website
description: Delivered a complete website for an external stakeholder (local pediatric practice), managing requirements through launch. The site covers both locations, services, staff profiles, and medical education documents.
